response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems at scale, and no demonstrable technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven experience in open-source project leadership and mentoring
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy complex systems (Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented technical leadership experience in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
